Command.Name: watch
Command.Description: Starts watching a directory (or directories specified by the 'DIRECTORY_WATCHER_DIRECTORIES' environment variable) for new .ZIP files.

Argument.Name: watch-directory
Argument.Description: Directory to watch for new .ZIP files. Attempts to watch directories defined by the 'DIRECTORY_WATCHER_DIRECTORIES' environment variable if unspecified.

Option.Description: Whether to automatically try to extract the content of the new .ZIP file.
Directory to watch for new .ZIP files; otherwise, attempts to watch directories defined by the 'DIRECTORY_WATCHER_DIRECTORIES' environment variable.
Whether to automatically overwrite files in the destination directory if any conflicts occur.
